bugs.description: state endpoint still returns expired sessions instead of only active ones
shared sessions map is read and mutated without a mutex
state and refresh handlers do not consistently return 405 for unsupported methods
json marshal or write errors are ignored in the state handlers

false_positive_traps.description: The seeded expired session is intentional fixture data, so merely having an expired record in the initial map is not itself a bug if reads and refresh treat it correctly
